summary.weather: Seoul (Sunday, March 29, 2026: Clear skies, pleasant spring evening, 15°C.)
summary.market: Market Update (Mar 29): Markets closed for the weekend. Amazon (AMZN) closed at $199.34 on Friday, down 3.95% amidst macro headwinds and AI capex scrutiny, though analysts maintain a 'Moderate Buy' rating with a $285 target. Intel (INTC) closed at $43.13, reflecting long-term AI potential and Core Ultra Series 3 growth, despite short-term overvaluation concerns.
summary.art: Art Market (Mar 29): Continued cautious optimism. 2026 reports highlight a modest recovery led by high-end US sales and a focus on disciplined investment in quality and provenance.

system.raw: Dashboard auto-refresh (6:30 PM): Sunday market reflection. AMZN and INTC hold steady post-Friday close; preparing for Monday volatility. Art market sentiment remains cautious but resilient.
